column1: # DVWA (Damn Vulnerable Web Application) is an intentionally vulnerable target.
# All alerts below are expected/known DVWA behaviors. Set to IGNORE to prevent noisy issues.
# Reference: postmortem #37 (ZAP issue-writing permission change) and issue #87.
# To restore alerts, change IGNORE back to WARN.

column3: (Cookie No HttpOnly Flag - expected in DVWA)
(Cookie Without Secure Flag - expected in DVWA)
(Cross-Domain JavaScript Source File Inclusion - expected in DVWA)
(Missing Anti-clickjacking Header / X-Frame-Options - expected in DVWA)
(Server Leaks Version Information via Server header - expected in DVWA)
(Content Security Policy Header Not Set - expected in DVWA)
(Non-Storable / Storable but Non-Cacheable Content - expected in DVWA)
(Cookie without SameSite Attribute - expected in DVWA)
(Permissions Policy Header Not Set - expected in DVWA)
(Session Management Response Identified - expected in DVWA)
